profileUrl.title: Linktree profile URL
profileUrl.description: Full URL of the Linktree profile to scrape, e.g. https://linktr.ee/jasminemaharjan__

linkFilter.title: Link filter (hostname contains)
linkFilter.description: Only keep links whose hostname contains this text (case-insensitive). Leave EMPTY (the default) to return EVERY link on the profile. Set it to e.g. 'daraz' to keep only daraz.com.np, s.daraz.com.np and click.daraz.com.np links.

scrapeProductDetails.title: Scrape product details (price + images)
scrapeProductDetails.description: For each Daraz link, also fetch the product to extract price, original/discounted price and the image gallery. Makes ~2 extra requests per link, so runs slower. Strongly recommended to enable Apify Proxy with Nepal (NP) residential IPs.

expandShortLinks.title: Expand short links only
expandShortLinks.description: Resolve each short link to its final product URL (without scraping price/images). Ignored when 'Scrape product details' is on, since that resolves the URL anyway.

maxConcurrency.title: Max concurrency
maxConcurrency.description: How many links to process in parallel when expanding or scraping product details.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy settings. For product scraping, use Apify Proxy with RESIDENTIAL group and country NP (Nepal) for the best success rate against Daraz bot protection.
